### Product Information

- Low nap microfiber towel, great for removing residue from the surface

- Removes wax, polish, coating, sealant residue with ease

- 80/20 polyester and polyamide blend

- Edgeless laser cut design

- Product Code: GY-6300

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 2 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

The Gyeon BaldWipe Evo Microfiber is a low nap microfiber towel, ideal for removing residue from your favorite polish, wax, sealant, or coating. When you apply any product that requires residue removal you almost always need more than one. One towel will become saturated in product quickly, which can cause streaking and/or marring. To maximize your towels performance use a towel specifically designed for the safe removal of excess products like the BaldWipe! This towel measures 16" x 16" and is made of an 80/20 polyester and polyamide blend. This blend provides you with an extremely soft towel, that will help you remove residue with ease. The nap is also very low, helping you remove more tightly bonded residue with ease. The edges of this towel are laser cut, giving you an minimalist edgeless design. There are no tags, stitching, or edging that you need to be aware of to avoid marring. Gyeon recommend keeping a few of these towels on hand to help you remove any of their coatings and for use with their [various other products](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/). Pick up a few Gyeon BaldWipe Evo Microfiber towels today, thank us tomorrow!

### From The Label

#### Product Description

The low pile, edgeless Q2M BaldWipe Evo is gentle yet very effective. It meets various applications, being equally effective during cleaning, polishing or maintaining a vehicle. It removes the remains of polishing pastes easily, without leaving marks or light scratches. Completely new weaving of the microfibre and higher than before GSM increases softness and absorbency. Ultrasonic cut provides a precise and safe edgeless finish. Wash with Q2M TowelWash regularly.
